Name: FEditorImportExportTestDefinition
Description: Holds settings for the asset import  export automation test

Variables.Name: ImportFilePath
Variables.Description:
The file to import 
	UPROPERTY(config, EditAnywhere, Category = Automation, meta = (FilePathFilter = ""))

Variables.Name: ExportFileExtension
Variables.Description: The file extension to use when exporting

Variables.Name: bSkipExport
Variables.Description: If true, the export step will be skipped
